name: Holiday Calendars
description: Adds public-holiday calendars (powered by Yasumi) to the main calendar. You may show holidays for one or more countries; each country becomes its own toggleable system calendar.
author: ChurchCRM Team

settings.label: Countries
settings.help: Comma-separated list of Yasumi country names (e.g. "USA,Mexico"). Leave blank to use the church country from System Settings.

settings.label: Holiday Categories
settings.help: Comma-separated Yasumi categories to include (official, observance, bank, seasonal, religious). Leave blank for all.
